calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-22-2009 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-01-2009 Reset To Sep-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Maria Lertora, #11935.

Petitioner Taiwan Lee Glen was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court requires further documentation from petitioner in order to proceed with the proposed name change. Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to September 22, 2009 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.
